title: God of Prompt: Karpathy's LLM knowledge base breakdown
rawContent:
Everyone's acting like Karpathy's LLM knowledge base is some PhD-level project.

It's 3 folders, 1 text file, and 30 minutes.

I broke down the full system with copy-paste prompts for every step.

And I told you where it breaks so you don't waste time finding out the hard [link to thread]

article.title: 🔑 karpathy's second brain: how to build it
